object.name: sendChatJoinRequestWebApp
object.description: Use this method to process a received chat join request query by showing a Mini App to the user before deciding the outcome. Returns True on success.
object.html_description: Use this method to process a received chat join request query by showing a Mini App to the user before deciding the outcome. Returns True on success.
object.rst_description: Use this method to process a received chat join request query by showing a Mini App to the user before deciding the outcome. Returns :code:`True` on success.

annotations.description: Unique identifier of the join request query
annotations.html_description: Unique identifier of the join request query
annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier of the join request query
annotations.name: chat_join_request_query_id

annotations.description: The URL of the Mini App to be opened
annotations.html_description: The URL of the Mini App to be opened
annotations.rst_description: The URL of the Mini App to be opened
annotations.name: web_app_url
